'''Ogoth Tiir''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Atravis sector/Legends|Atravis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
This planet was the site of the final [[Battle of Ogoth Tiir/Legends|battle]] of the [[Western Reaches Operation]] in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces killed [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Kendu Ultho]] and captured his remaining forces.<ref name="TEGtW" /> It was a fierce battle that led to [[Jona Grumby]] being crippled.<ref name="HS&CSS">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>
